Meaning.En: A piece of thick fabric or other material used to cover part of a floor, typically for warmth or decoration.
Meaning.Example: She added a colorful rug to make the living room feel cozier.

Situation.Vi: Thảm lót sàn trong phòng khách, phòng ngủ hoặc phòng trẻ em.
Situation.En: A floor covering placed in living rooms, bedrooms, or children’s rooms for comfort and aesthetics.

Situation.Vi: Thảm trang trí hoặc thảm chống trượt trong nhà bếp hoặc phòng tắm.
Situation.En: A decorative or non-slip rug used in kitchens or bathrooms.

Meaning.Vi: Chiếc chăn nhỏ (thường dùng cho ngựa)
Meaning.En: A small blanket, especially one used to cover a horse.
Meaning.Example: The stable hand draped a woolen rug over the shivering horse.

Situation.Vi: Chăn phủ ngựa sau khi cưỡi hoặc trong thời tiết lạnh.
Situation.En: A blanket placed on a horse after riding or during cold weather to keep it warm.
